parameters.query: SELECT * FROM ai_extractions WHERE company_domain = $1 AND run_id = $2

parameters.jsCode:
// Normalize and prepare all merged data for export formatting
const input = $input.first().json;

const get = (field, fallback) => {
  return input[field] !== undefined && input[field] !== null ? input[field] : fallback;
};

return [{
  run_id: get('run_id', ''),
  company_domain: get('company_domain', ''),
  export_format: get('export_format', 'json'),
  score_card_id: get('score_card_id', ''),

  company_name: get('name', '') || get('company_name', '') || get('company', ''),
  description: get('description', ''),
  founded_year: get('founded_year', ''),
  employees: get('employees', ''),
  headquarters: get('headquarters', ''),
  website: get('website', ''),
  logo_url: get('logo_url', ''),

  score: get('total_score', 0) || get('score', 0),
  confidence: get('confidence', ''),
  product_score: get('product_score', 0) || get('product', 0),
  icp_score: get('icp_score', 0) || get('icp', 0),
  team_score: get('team_score', 0) || get('team', 0),
  business_model_score: get('business_model_score', 0) || get('business_model', 0),
  funding_score: get('funding_score', 0) || get('funding', 0),
  growth_score: get('growth_score', 0) || get('growth', 0),
  market_score: get('market_score', 0) || get('market', 0),
  risk_score: get('risk_score', 0) || get('risk', 0),

  product_summary: get('product_summary', ''),
  icp_analysis: get('icp_analysis', ''),
  team_analysis: get('team_analysis', ''),
  funding_summary: get('funding_summary', ''),
  growth_indicators: get('growth_indicators', ''),
  market_analysis: get('market_analysis', ''),
  risk_factors: get('risk_factors', '') || get('risk_summary', 'No risk factors identified.'),
  products: get('products', '[]'),

  report_url: get('report_url', ''),
}]

const d = $input.first().json;
const ts = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

const scoreBar = (label, score, maxScore) => {
  const filled = Math.round((Number(score) / (maxScore || 100)) * 20);
  const bar = '█'.repeat(Math.min(filled, 20)) + '░'.repeat(Math.max(0, 20 - filled));
  return `${label.padEnd(18)} ${String(score).padStart(3)}/100 ${bar}`;
};

let productsSection = 'N/A';
try {
  const products = typeof d.products === 'string' ? JSON.parse(d.products || '[]') : (d.products || []);
  if (products.length > 0) {
    productsSection = products.map(p => `- ${p.name || p.title || p}`).join('\n');
  }
} catch(e) {}

const md = [
  `# Jasfo Score Card Report`,
  `**Company:** ${d.company_name}  `,
  `**Domain:** ${d.company_domain}  `,
  `**Date:** ${ts}  `,
  `**Confidence:** ${d.confidence}  `,
  `**Report URL:** ${d.report_url || 'N/A'}`,
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  '## Company Overview',
  `| Field | Value |`,
  `|-------|-------|`,
  `| Description | ${(d.description || 'N/A').replace(/\|/g, '\\|')} |`,
  `| Founded | ${d.founded_year || 'N/A'} |`,
  `| Employees | ${d.employees || 'N/A'} |`,
  `| Headquarters | ${d.headquarters || 'N/A'} |`,
  `| Website | ${d.website || 'N/A'} |`,
  '',
  '## Score Card',
  `**Composite Score: ${d.score}/100**`,
  '',
  '| Pillar | Score | Distribution |',
  '|--------|-------|--------------|',
  `| Product | ${d.product_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.product_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| ICP Fit | ${d.icp_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.icp_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| Team | ${d.team_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.team_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| Business Model | ${d.business_model_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.business_model_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| Funding | ${d.funding_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.funding_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| Growth | ${d.growth_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.growth_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| Market | ${d.market_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.market_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  `| Risk | ${d.risk_score}/100 | ${scoreBar('', d.risk_score, 100).trim()} |`,
  '',
  '## Products',
  productsSection,
  '',
  '## AI Analysis',
  '',
  '### Product Summary',
  d.product_summary || 'N/A',
  '',
  '### ICP Analysis',
  d.icp_analysis || 'N/A',
  '',
  '### Team Analysis',
  d.team_analysis || 'N/A',
  '',
  '### Funding Summary',
  d.funding_summary || 'N/A',
  '',
  '### Growth Indicators',
  d.growth_indicators || 'N/A',
  '',
  '### Market Analysis',
  d.market_analysis || 'N/A',
  '',
  '## Risk Factors',
  d.risk_factors || 'No risk factors identified.',
  '',
  '---',
  `_Generated by Jasfo Platform on ${ts}_`
].join('\n');

return [{
  run_id: d.run_id,
  company_domain: d.company_domain,
  format: 'markdown',
  content: md,
  company_name: d.company_name,
  score: d.score,
  confidence: d.confidence,
  product_score: d.product_score,
  icp_score: d.icp_score,
  funding_score: d.funding_score,
  growth_score: d.growth_score,
  report_url: d.report_url,
  risk_factors: d.risk_factors
}]

const d = $input.first().json;
const ts = new Date().toISOString();

const riskSummary = typeof d.risk_factors === 'string'
  ? d.risk_factors.substring(0, 400)
  : 'No risk factors identified.';

const msg = [
  '\u{1F4CA} *' + (d.company_name || d.company_domain) + '*',
  '',
  'Score: *' + d.score + '/100* \u2014 ' + (d.confidence || 'N/A'),
  '',
  '*Key Pillars*',
  'Product: ' + d.product_score + ' | ICP: ' + d.icp_score,
  'Funding: ' + d.funding_score + ' | Growth: ' + d.growth_score,
  '',
  '*Risk Factors*',
  riskSummary,
  '',
  '\u{1F517} Report: ' + (d.report_url || 'N/A')
].join('\n');

return [{
  run_id: d.run_id,
  company_domain: d.company_domain,
  format: 'telegram',
  content: msg,
  text: msg,
  chat_id: '={{ -5497421027 }}',
  parse_mode: 'Markdown',
  company_name: d.company_name,
  score: d.score,
  report_url: d.report_url
}]

parameters.query: INSERT INTO report_archive (run_id, company_domain, format, content, delivered_at, delivery_status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, NOW(), 'delivered')
UPDATE scenario_queue SET status = 'completed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE run_id = $1
